reference: Any kind of stress in the body can lead to injury. I think there must be a lot of pressure on the back muscles. This is normal after exertion. You can take a muscle relaxant, and things will return to normal. Even if you work for long hours, try to do some body stretches; it helps to relax the muscles.
text: Any kind of stress in the body can lead to injury. I think there must be a lot of pressure on the back muscles. This is normal after exertion. You can take a muscle relaxant, and things will return to normal. Even if you work for long hours, try to do some body stretches. It helps relax the muscles.
